product.name: Heritage Linen Jacket
product.description: Crafted from premium Belgian linen, this jacket embodies understated elegance. The relaxed silhouette and natural texture speak to a philosophy of quiet luxury—clothing that improves with age and wears its history beautifully.
details: Two patch pockets, single button closure
product.care: Machine wash cold, gentle cycle. Lay flat to dry. Iron on low heat while slightly damp.

related.name: Relaxed Merino Sweater
related.description: Spun from extra-fine merino wool, this sweater offers incomparable softness against the skin. The dropped shoulders and easy fit create an effortless silhouette that transitions seamlessly from home to street.
related.care: Hand wash in cool water with wool detergent. Dry flat away from direct sunlight.

related.name: Wide Leg Trousers
related.description: Cut from a luxurious wool-cotton blend, these wide-leg trousers are the cornerstone of an elevated wardrobe. The high waist and generous leg create a long, fluid line that flatters every silhouette.
related.care: Dry clean recommended. Or hand wash cold, dry flat.

related.name: Silk Slip Dress
related.description: Woven from mulberry silk and cut on the bias, this slip dress moves with a liquid grace. Minimal in design yet rich in feel, it is the piece that elevates everything it touches.
related.care: Hand wash in cool water or dry clean. Store hanging in a breathable garment bag.
